ValidationRule.description: The Check-in Date must be within 30 days of Today() during postponement. Allowing the Check-in date to be rescheduled into the future as it passes
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxt'), NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Postponed_Start_Date__c)), (ISPICKVAL( SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c, "Postponed")), OR( ((SaaS_Postponed_Check_In_Date__c - Today()) >30), ((SaaS_Postponed_Check_In_Date__c - Today()) <0) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SaaS Postponed Check-in Date must be within 30 days of Today's Date
